description: Marrow is middleware for insurance distribution through AI agents, translating conversational requests into insurer quote, compare, and bind workflows while enforcing compliance controls. It connects AI applications and partners to insurer pricing and underwriting systems through a canonical protocol.
summary: trymalcolm.com exposes a REST API plus MCP servers: a documented Marrow MCP endpoint authenticated with a bearer API key, and a catalog-listed public Aviva MCP endpoint.
